name: khajana-awareness-data
title: Deep Awareness & Hidden Truths Knowledge Base (खजाना)
description: A verified, cross-referenced knowledge base focusing on mental liberation, systemic truths, financial illusions, geopolitical narratives, and paths to total freedom. All claims verified with Wikipedia sources. Organized following Open Knowledge Format (OKF) principles.

resources.name: awareness-journey-index
resources.description: Main index tracking the 6 pillars of the awakening journey.

resources.name: master-timeline
resources.description: Chronological timeline from 1694 to present. Wikipedia verified.

resources.name: silenced-geniuses
resources.description: 30 geniuses from India & worldwide who were killed or silenced for challenging the system. Wikipedia verified.

resources.name: curated-web-resources
resources.description: A consolidated database of 280+ premium free resources for coding, OSINT, health, psychology, and finance parsed from local HTML databases.

resources.name: dashboard
resources.description: A self-contained local interactive HTML dashboard to track the 30-day action plan, write critical thinking journal logs, and search curated web resources.

resources.description: Dar Se Mukti: psychological conditioning, advertising psychology, media propaganda.
